title: Before you disable Google Play Protect, here's what you need to know - Engadget
summary: If you're enrolled in Google's Advanced Protection Program, you will need to disable it first: You may have to restart your device and wait for a while before Advanced Protection stops working and you can disable Play Protect.
caption: output/2026-07-22/before-you-disable-google-play-protect-here-s-what-you-need-to-know-en.txt
